title: how i just found a new trading community with 150+ courses and it’s honestly a hidden gem
author: Unlikely_Rope3905
selftext:
i wasn’t even looking for anything new but i stumbled on this new trading community and it honestly feels like a spot most people don’t know about yet

the first thing that hit me was the amount of content, there’s 150+ full trading courses adding up to over 1000 hours of material most of it from well-known mentors and full mentorships that are usually hard to find or super expensive

so far i’ve mostly been going through powell, dutch, pb, ict and orderflow content and it’s all proper full mentorships not just snippets, there’s also a ton of other courses i haven’t even explored yet some from names i didn’t even know

because the community is still new it doesn’t feel crowded or spammy, you can go at your own pace and really build your knowledge step by step, plus there’s free content too so you can check the quality before deciding anything

i’m not dropping the link here because i want to keep the community small and serious, but if you’re really into learning and motivated, send me a dm and i’ll give you more info

finding something like this felt like discovering a hidden library for traders it’s honestly saving me a ton of time compared to jumping between random videos and half-explained strategies

comments.author: FxingMyLife
comments.body: Let me guess... you aren't affiliated with it at all?

comments.author: ancientRAMEN
comments.body: How do you write this much and not share the resource? You didn’t even create it? Why gatekeep something you didn’t create? This is so obviously a scam. Jesus dude, NO ONE IS BUYING THIS!!!!

replies.author: Unlikely_Rope3905
replies.body: Come on, man, don't believe it 👌
